summary: ReviewHub correction feedback captured for future workflow planning.

task.title: Case Study 1: Heritage District Built-Environment X-Indicator Construction
task.problem_context: Paper9 studies how built-environment indicators X of historical districts influence tourists' perceived historical-style intensity Y. This case builds multiple X indicators for 宁波老外滩 (Ningbo Old Bund) after verifying data feasibility.

aoi_boundaries.name: Historical district AOI boundaries
aoi_boundaries.description: AOI polygon for Ningbo Old Bund heritage district
aoi_boundaries.uncertainty: Boundary verified against official heritage protection zoning

sinobf1_building_functions.name: SinoBF-1 building function predictions
sinobf1_building_functions.description: ML-predicted building-level function labels (commercial, residential, heritage, ...)
sinobf1_building_functions.uncertainty: ML prediction accuracy; may miss small-scale heritage structures

osm_road_building_cache.name: OSM road network and building footprint cache
osm_road_building_cache.description: Pre-fetched OSM roads, buildings, POIs within AOI buffer
osm_road_building_cache.uncertainty: OSM freshness may vary; cache may predate recent OSM edits

evaluation_focus: data feasibility classification (which data are actually usable)
indicator computability triage: directly computable / proxy only / not computable
reviewable intermediate outputs and correction hooks
evidence manifest completeness (spatial / temporal / population / governance)
